channel.title: Parentheses on ftvkyo
channel.description: Recent content in Parentheses on ftvkyo

item.title: Parentheses devlog #1: getting to LLVM IR emission
item.description: Table of contents Table of contents Pre-intro Intro The language What has been done already Current state Input Tokenized Parsed Verified Transformed IR Emitted Future updates Pre-intro I start these series hoping to continue them along with the development of the project this devlog is related to. Not only the project is an excercise for me, but the devlog itself is as well. I think about making some games in the future, and how could I make a good game without having a devlog about it?
